headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Buying Welltower (WELL) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Welltower's current share price makes sense, you are not alone. Many investors are asking if the recent run still lines up with the fundamentals. The stock most recently closed at US$210.16, with returns of 0.3% over 7 days, 11.6% over 30 days, 12.4% year to date, 36.2% over 1 year, 198.7% over 3 years and 230.7% over 5 years. Those returns have put a spotlight on how the market is currently viewing Welltower and have raised fresh questions about what is already...
